title: prd_artifact
description: Artifact produced by the drafting room: the PRD written to disk plus a checkpoint summary and a self-assessed completeness signal.

summary_markdown.description: Checkpoint view the operator reads: the PRD body, or a digest if the full doc is large. Markdown.

file_path.description: Path (relative to working_dir) the PRD markdown was written to.

confidence.description: Author's own estimate that the PRD is solid given the inputs.

needs_clarification.description: True when the author judges more operator input is required before the PRD is solid.

follow_up_questions.description: Questions to route into another clarification round when needs_clarification is true. Empty otherwise.

sections.description: Optional outline of the PRD's top-level sections.
